ext_common_01.name: Fighter
ext_common_01.body: A small, fast attack ship. Fires at the ship as it approaches. Deals 1 damage on action spaces and 2 damage when it reaches the ship.
ext_common_01.details: Speed: Normal. Health: 3. Appears in one zone. Attacks on trajectory action spaces for 1 damage each, then deals 2 damage on impact.

ext_common_02.name: Destroyer
ext_common_02.body: A heavily armed warship. Fires powerful volleys at the ship as it advances. Deals 2 damage on action spaces and 3 damage when it reaches the ship.
ext_common_02.details: Speed: Normal. Health: 5. Appears in one zone. Attacks on trajectory action spaces for 2 damage each, then deals 3 damage on impact.

ext_common_03.name: Energy Cloud
ext_common_03.body: A drifting cloud of charged particles. Drains 1 energy from the targeted zone on each action space. If it reaches the ship, drains all remaining energy in the zone.
ext_common_03.summary: Drains energy from the targeted zone
ext_common_03.details: Speed: Normal. Health: 2. Drains energy instead of dealing structural damage. Shields do not block energy drain.

ext_common_04.name: Gunship
ext_common_04.body: A fast-moving gunship that fires rapidly. Deals 1 damage on each action space and 1 damage when it reaches the ship. Fast speed makes it harder to destroy in time.
ext_common_04.summary: Fast ship with repeated light attacks
ext_common_04.details: Speed: Fast (advances 2 spaces per turn). Health: 3. Frequent light attacks make accumulated damage significant.

ext_common_05.name: Asteroid
ext_common_05.body: A large space rock hurtling toward the ship. Does nothing on approach but deals 4 damage on impact if not destroyed.
ext_common_05.summary: High impact damage if not destroyed
ext_common_05.details: Speed: Normal. Health: 4. No attacks during approach, but devastating 4 damage on impact. Must be destroyed before arrival.

ext_common_06.name: Scout
ext_common_06.body: A small reconnaissance vessel. Deals 1 damage on each action space. Weak but arrives quickly due to fast speed.
ext_common_06.details: Speed: Fast. Health: 2. Low damage per hit but arrives quickly, giving less time to react.

ext_common_07.name: Pulse Ball
ext_common_07.body: An energy sphere that disrupts ship systems. On each action space, it forces the targeted zone's shield down. Deals 2 damage on impact.
ext_common_07.summary: Disables shields and deals impact damage
ext_common_07.details: Speed: Normal. Health: 3. Drops shields on action spaces, making the zone vulnerable to other threats. Deals 2 damage on arrival.

ext_common_08.name: Frigate
ext_common_08.body: A sturdy military vessel. Deals 1 damage on action spaces and 3 damage on impact. High health makes it difficult to destroy.
ext_common_08.summary: Durable ship with moderate to high damage
ext_common_08.details: Speed: Normal. Health: 6. Tough to bring down with a single weapon. Coordinate fire from multiple turns.

ext_serious_01.name: Battleship
ext_serious_01.body: A massive warship bristling with weapons. Deals 2 damage on each action space and 4 damage when it reaches the ship. Extremely dangerous if not handled quickly.
ext_serious_01.details: Speed: Normal. Health: 8. Serious threat. Requires concentrated fire from multiple crew members across several turns to destroy.

ext_serious_02.name: Nemesis
ext_serious_02.body: An advanced alien warship. Deals 2 damage on action spaces and regenerates 1 health each turn it is not damaged. Deals 5 damage on impact.
ext_serious_02.details: Speed: Normal. Health: 7. Regenerates 1 HP per turn unless damaged that turn. Must sustain continuous fire to bring it down.

ext_serious_03.name: Leviathan
ext_serious_03.body: An enormous space creature. Deals 3 damage on each action space. If it reaches the ship, it deals 6 damage and destroys the zone outright.
ext_serious_03.details: Speed: Slow. Health: 10. Slow but devastating. Use its slow speed to pour all available firepower into it before arrival.

ext_serious_04.name: Stealth Fighter
ext_serious_04.body: An invisible attack craft that cannot be targeted until visual confirmation is performed. Deals 2 damage on action spaces and 3 damage on impact.
ext_serious_04.summary: Invisible until confirmed, then attacks hard
ext_serious_04.details: Speed: Fast. Health: 4. Requires visual confirmation (Upper White B action) before any weapons can damage it. Fast speed leaves little time.

ext_serious_05.name: Energy Leech
ext_serious_05.body: A parasitic entity that drains 2 energy from the targeted zone on each action space. On impact, completely disables the zone's reactor permanently for the rest of the mission.
ext_serious_05.details: Speed: Normal. Health: 5. Serious threat. Energy drain bypasses shields. If it reaches the ship, the zone loses all power permanently.

ext_serious_06.name: Carrier
ext_serious_06.body: A large carrier ship that launches fighter drones. On each action space, spawns a minor fighter threat in the same zone with 2 health and 1 damage. Deals 3 damage on impact.
ext_serious_06.summary: Spawns additional fighters as it approaches
ext_serious_06.details: Speed: Slow. Health: 7. Each spawned fighter must be dealt with separately. Can overwhelm a zone if not addressed early.
